Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

3 
ACTV_XREF_IND 
LABEL: 
MEDPAR Active Cross Reference Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: The code indicating whether the claim number originated from a cross-reference. 
SHORT NAME: ACTV_XREF_IND 
LONG NAME: ACTV_XREF_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
X = Cross-Reference 
A = Active 
COMMENT: 
This field is always missing.
